tiktok.ad_text: OPEN CALL FOR STREAMERS & CONTENT CREATORS. WE WANT YOU! DM @hologramboxing

meta.headline: WE WANT YOU!
meta.primary_text:
OPEN CALL FOR STREAMERS & CONTENT CREATORS
WE WANT YOU!

Do you love live entertainment, AI, and the future of combat sports? Join Creators AI Hologram Boxing and help us build the next generation of fight night experiences!

WE'RE LOOKING FOR:
Kick & Twitch Streamers · YouTube Content Creators · TikTok & Reel Creators · Social Media Influencers · Event Hype Teams

OPPORTUNITIES INCLUDE:
Live Fight Night Streaming Access · Co-Stream Partnerships · Hologram Boxing Event Coverage · Brand Ambassador Roles · Exclusive VIP Ringside Access

INTERESTED? DM US WITH: Name, Channel Link
DM @hologramboxing
VISIT HOLOGRAMBOXING.COM

acmo_rationale: Creator-skewed age 18-34 on Meta, 18-44 on TikTok; exact poster copy preserves trust; landing page sign-up is primary conversion goal; Reels/Stories-heavy Meta placements for creator discovery.
